arts.ttl: Lazio vs Viktoria Plzen | Europa League Preview | Where to Watch, Form Guide, Insights, Lineups
arts.sum: Following their empathic win in the first leg, Lazio will be looking to finish the job at home when they host Viktoria Plzen for the second leg of the Europa League Round of 16. arts.ttl: Roma and Lazio Formally Confirm Two Contract Extensions
arts.sum: Leandro Paredes will stay at Roma for at least another year, while Lazio have locked up Christos Mandas long-term. The Giallorossi had been working on such a deal.
